news.title:
Kotak Mahindra Mutual Fund acquires over 5% stake in Avanti Feeds.
This acquisition indicates investor confidence and growth potential for Avanti Feeds.
news.summary:
Kotak Mahindra Mutual Fund acquires over 5% stake in Avanti Feeds.
This acquisition indicates investor confidence and growth potential for Avanti Feeds.

news.title:
Avanti Feeds highlights improved shrimp export demand in Q3 FY26.
Company forecasts FY26 PBT margin at 14.5–15% amid rising costs.
news.summary:
Avanti Feeds highlights improved shrimp export demand in Q3 FY26.
Company forecasts FY26 PBT margin at 14.5–15% amid rising costs.

news.title:
Avanti Feeds released an audio recording of its Q3 FY26 earnings call.
The recording is available on the company's website under Investor Conference Call Recordings.
news.summary:
Avanti Feeds released an audio recording of its Q3 FY26 earnings call.
The recording is available on the company's website under Investor Conference Call Recordings.

news.title:
Avanti Feeds reported Q3 FY26 revenue growth of 1.3% YoY to ₹13,835 Mn.
EBITDA rose 20.7% YoY to ₹2,387 Mn; PAT increased 16.1% YoY to ₹1,635 Mn.
news.summary:
Avanti Feeds reported Q3 FY26 revenue growth of 1.3% YoY to ₹13,835 Mn.
EBITDA rose 20.7% YoY to ₹2,387 Mn; PAT increased 16.1% YoY to ₹1,635 Mn.

news.title:
Avanti Feeds' Q3 FY25 net sales rose 1.3% YoY to Rs 1,383.5 crore.
Net profit increased 10.5% YoY to Rs 149.4 crore; EPS grew to Rs 12.
news.summary:
Avanti Feeds' Q3 FY25 net sales rose 1.3% YoY to Rs 1,383.5 crore.
Net profit increased 10.5% YoY to Rs 149.4 crore; EPS grew to Rs 12.

news.title:
Avanti Feeds reports minor correction in Q3 and 9M EPS, Q3 EPS at Rs. 10.97.
Financials and segment results unchanged; wind power segment divested as non-core asset.
news.summary:
Avanti Feeds reports minor correction in Q3 and 9M EPS, Q3 EPS at Rs. 10.97.
Financials and segment results unchanged; wind power segment divested as non-core asset.

news.title:
Avanti Feeds surged 11.1%, hitting a 52-week and all-time high of Rs 1321.8.
The stock extended its 4-day winning streak, delivering a 27.6% cumulative return.
news.summary:
Avanti Feeds surged 11.1%, hitting a 52-week and all-time high of Rs 1321.8.
The stock extended its 4-day winning streak, delivering a 27.6% cumulative return.

news.title:
Avanti Feeds invests Rs. 24.99 lakh in Quanta People Solutions, acquiring 0.8% stake.
The strategic move aims to expand into AI-enabled HR tech solutions.
news.summary:
Avanti Feeds invests Rs. 24.99 lakh in Quanta People Solutions, acquiring 0.8% stake.
The strategic move aims to expand into AI-enabled HR tech solutions.

news.title: Avanti Feeds Q3 revenue rises to 13.8B INR from 13.7B INR YoY.
news.summary: Avanti Feeds Q3 revenue rises to 13.8B INR from 13.7B INR YoY.

news.title:
India-US trade deal boosts shrimp exporters like Avanti Feeds with tariff cuts.
Apex Frozen also benefits from improved export prospects under the agreement.
news.summary:
India-US trade deal boosts shrimp exporters like Avanti Feeds with tariff cuts.
Apex Frozen also benefits from improved export prospects under the agreement.

news.title:
Sensex and Nifty 50 anticipate a major gap-up after the historic India-US trade deal, reducing tariffs from 50% to 18%.
Export-driven sectors like textiles (Gokaldas Exports, Welspun Living), shrimp (Avanti Feeds), and auto (Bharat Forge) may see sentiment impacts.
news.summary:
Sensex and Nifty 50 anticipate a major gap-up after the historic India-US trade deal, reducing tariffs from 50% to 18%.
Export-driven sectors like textiles (Gokaldas Exports, Welspun Living), shrimp (Avanti Feeds), and auto (Bharat Forge) may see sentiment impacts.

news.title:
India-US trade deal reduces tariffs to 18% from 50%, benefiting exporters like Gokaldas Exports, Avanti Feeds, and IT firms like TCS, Infosys.
Textile stocks gain competitive edge over Bangladesh, Vietnam; Bharat Forge benefits from US truck market exposure and defence tie-ups.
news.summary:
India-US trade deal reduces tariffs to 18% from 50%, benefiting exporters like Gokaldas Exports, Avanti Feeds, and IT firms like TCS, Infosys.
Textile stocks gain competitive edge over Bangladesh, Vietnam; Bharat Forge benefits from US truck market exposure and defence tie-ups.

news.title:
Avanti Feeds completed sale of 4 windmills with 3.2 MW capacity.
The sale was approved in a prior board meeting and disclosed per regulations.
news.summary:
Avanti Feeds completed sale of 4 windmills with 3.2 MW capacity.
The sale was approved in a prior board meeting and disclosed per regulations.

news.title:
Avanti Feeds Ltd's board to meet on Feb 11, 2026, to approve Q3 FY25 unaudited results.
Notice available on company's website; compliance details provided by management.
news.summary:
Avanti Feeds Ltd's board to meet on Feb 11, 2026, to approve Q3 FY25 unaudited results.
Notice available on company's website; compliance details provided by management.

news.title:
Gokaldas Exports shares plunged 12% on Jan 8, marking their worst fall since April 2020, trading at ₹604.7.
Export stocks like Avanti Feeds, Pearl Global fell 3-7% over US trade uncertainties; Gokaldas is down 53% from Dec 2024 high.
news.summary:
Gokaldas Exports shares plunged 12% on Jan 8, marking their worst fall since April 2020, trading at ₹604.7.
Export stocks like Avanti Feeds, Pearl Global fell 3-7% over US trade uncertainties; Gokaldas is down 53% from Dec 2024 high.

news.title:
Indian seafood exporters rose up to 11% as China plans to suspend Japanese imports.
The demand shift favoring Indian suppliers boosts stocks like Avanti Feeds and Geojit Financial Services.
news.summary:
Indian seafood exporters rose up to 11% as China plans to suspend Japanese imports.
The demand shift favoring Indian suppliers boosts stocks like Avanti Feeds and Geojit Financial Services.

news.title:
Cabinet approves export promotion mission with ₹25,060 crore budget, focusing on MSMEs & labor-intensive sectors.
Stocks to watch: Avanti Feeds, Gokaldas Exports, KPR Mill, all with strong export-focused strategies & growth plans.
news.summary:
Cabinet approves export promotion mission with ₹25,060 crore budget, focusing on MSMEs & labor-intensive sectors.
Stocks to watch: Avanti Feeds, Gokaldas Exports, KPR Mill, all with strong export-focused strategies & growth plans.

news.title:
Avanti Feeds' Q2FY26 revenue grew 19% YoY to Rs 16,097 Mn; PAT rose 38.9% YoY to Rs 1,688 Mn.
Shrimp processing revenue increased 64% YoY, while shrimp feed revenue grew 7.6% YoY but declined 6.2% QoQ.
news.summary:
Avanti Feeds' Q2FY26 revenue grew 19% YoY to Rs 16,097 Mn; PAT rose 38.9% YoY to Rs 1,688 Mn.
Shrimp processing revenue increased 64% YoY, while shrimp feed revenue grew 7.6% YoY but declined 6.2% QoQ.

news.title:
Avanti Feeds Ltd schedules Q2 FY26 earnings call on Nov 15, 2025, at 4 PM IST.
Senior management will discuss unaudited financial results for Q2 FY26 during the audio conference.
news.summary:
Avanti Feeds Ltd schedules Q2 FY26 earnings call on Nov 15, 2025, at 4 PM IST.
Senior management will discuss unaudited financial results for Q2 FY26 during the audio conference.

news.title:
Avanti Feeds' Q2 PAT rose 35% YoY to Rs 153 crore; revenue grew 19% to Rs 1,609.69 crore.
Processed shrimp revenue surged 63.7% YoY to Rs 451.49 crore; shrimp hatchery revenue dropped 46.2%.
news.summary:
Avanti Feeds' Q2 PAT rose 35% YoY to Rs 153 crore; revenue grew 19% to Rs 1,609.69 crore.
Processed shrimp revenue surged 63.7% YoY to Rs 451.49 crore; shrimp hatchery revenue dropped 46.2%.
